UPDATE dynamischeKorrekturFaktorenOption SET <<<<<<< Updated upstream subtypeTxtOptNameDKff = 'test 4', subtypeTxtoptzBezugDkff = '2008', subtypeTxtoptzTempDkff = '', subtypeTxtoptzFaktoreDkff = '7', formatDynamicType = 'year', ======= subtypeTxtOptNameDKff = 'test 11', subtypeTxtoptzBezugDkff = '09', subtypeTxtoptzTempDkff = '', subtypeTxtoptzFaktoreDkff = '21', formatDynamicType = 'month', >>>>>>> Stashed changes bezugStartTxt = '', bezugEndTxt = '', tempStartTxt = '', tempEndTxt = '' WHERE dKffOption_id = 28
